arts.ttl: Jimmy Thelin knows Aberdeen now or never moment has arrived as he urges them to avoid strange Scottish Cup approach
arts.sum: Thelin was only 12 when the Dons last lifted the famous old trophy in 1990 as they return to Hampden for first time since Celtic hammering

arts.ttl: Who will win Hearts vs Aberdeen? Our writers predict Scottish Cup semi-final blockbuster at Hampden
arts.sum: It's the first of two big games at the national stadium this weekend with a spot in the final and a return the big prize on offer

arts.ttl: What channel is Hearts vs Aberdeen? Live stream, TV, ref, VAR and team news for Scottish Cup semi final at Hampden
arts.sum: The Jambos and the Dons face off in Glasgow for a place in the final on May 24

arts.ttl: Islam Chesnokov agrees Hearts transfer as Frankie Kent insists there's only one way to bury Premiership woe
arts.sum: The Jambos tried to get Chesnokov in January but have seen their patience rewarded after missing out

arts.ttl: Nisbet benefits from 'complete reset' at Aberdeen
arts.sum: As he prepares for Saturday's Scottish Cup semi-final with Hearts, Aberdeen striker Nisbet credits his manager and extra work for making him "a more complete player".

arts.ttl: Jimmy Thelin reveals Aberdeen trio in line for shock semi-final return against Hearts
arts.sum: Jamie McGrath and Gavin Molloy were expected to be out for the season while Dimitar Mitov is also available again

arts.ttl: How religion helped Hearts' Kabangu defy Covid coma
arts.sum: Hearts striker Elton Kabangu tells BBC Sport Scotland's chief sports writer Tom English how his Christian faith helped him through a 16-day coma.

arts.ttl: Oday Dabbagh contract call as Aberdeen loanee sees parent club in transfer move to halt free agency
arts.sum: The Dons currently have the 26-year-old on-loan for the rest of the season

arts.ttl: James Wilson and fellow Scotland starlet pen new Hearts contracts
arts.sum: Jambos boss Critchley said: “It’s great news that both James and Adam have committed their futures to the club. Rising Scotland stars James Wilson and Adam Forrester have both signed new contracts with Hearts .

arts.ttl: Andrew McKinlay offers grovelling Hearts apology for top six failure as CEO's boast bites him in the backside
arts.sum: McKinlay had predicted that Hearts would still go onto challenge for a European qualification spot
